mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.view_count, p.created_at, p.category, u.nickname, u.id AS user_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments c WHERE c.post_id = p.id) AS comment_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_likes pl WHERE pl.post_id = p.id) AS like_count FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.id IN ( SELECT pt.post_id FROM post_tags pt JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE t.name = #{tag} )
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.id IN ( SELECT pt.post_id FROM post_tags pt JOIN tags t ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE t.name = #{tag} )
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
